data.title: Planet Lunch News
USDC Circulation Sees Slight Decline Amid Recent Issuance and Redemption
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3 billion USDC and redeemed around 3.2 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to May 29. This activity resulted in a net decrease of about 200 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 61 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately 61.3 billion USD. Of these reserves, around 8 billion USD is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately 53.3 billion USD.

data.title: Japan weighs tough choices as bond market volatility intensifies
data.description:
Japan’s bond market is under real pressure, and both the government and the central bank are facing some of the most uncomfortable decisions in years. Borrowing costs have hit record highs, demand is collapsing, and investors are walking away. According to the Financial Times, policymakers are now scrambling to figure out how to stop things […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-tough-choices-bond-market-volatility/

data.title: Heurist launches Deep Research, an AI research platform built on the x402 payment protocol
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Decentralized AI infrastructure project Heurist announced the launch of Heurist Deep Research, an AI research platform built on the x402 payment protocol launched by Coinbase.
Heurist Deep Research can scan 100+ network resources at the same time, cross-reference on-chain data with social sentiment analysis, and generate comprehensive multi-page research reports in a few minutes. It adopts a fixed pricing model of 1 USDC per query. Heurist Deep Research runs on the x402 protocol, supports 200 millisecond settlement time and micropayment functions, and users can use USDC to pay query fees directly on the Base mainnet without subscribing or setting up API keys.

data.title: Federal Reserve expected to hold steady as spending slows and inflation cools
data.description:
The Federal Reserve is staying on pause again, holding interest rates steady as spending cools off and inflation inches closer to its 2% goal. On Friday, Commerce Department data revealed that consumer prices rose 2. 1% in April compared to a year earlier, down from 2. 3% in March. That puts inflation within touching distance of the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/federal-reserve-expected-to-hold-steady/

data.title: Panama Canal Could Prioritize Bitcoin-Paying Ships, Mayor Suggests
data.description:
Panama City’s mayor, Mayer Mizrachi, put forward an unusual plan at the Bitcoin 2025 conference in Las Vegas on May 29. He suggested that cargo ships could speed up their transit through the Panama Canal if they paid in Bitcoin. It was a brief comment, but it set off a flurry of questions about how it might work in practice. Related Reading: Tether’s 2-Year, $5 Billion Investment Blitz Fuels US Companies: CEO Bitcoin Payments For Priority Passage According to reports from the panel, Mizrachi spoke alongside El Salvador’s Bitcoin policy leaders, Max Keiser and Stacy Herbert
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/panama-canal-could-prioritize-bitcoin-paying-ships-mayor-suggests/

data.title: WLFI: USD1 will be the only designated stablecoin for Sahara Labs’ offering
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News World Liberty Financial officially announced on X that USD1 will be the only designated stablecoin for Sahara Labs (SAHARA) to be sold on the Buidlpad platform. The cooperation aims to promote the development of crowdfunding and promote a more open, fair and accessible AI future.

data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$126.152 billion, and the cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.369 billion.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (May 30, Eastern Time) the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$616 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of US$431 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$48.569 billion.
The second largest was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net outflow of US$120 million in a single day. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow has reached US$2.444 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$126.152 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 6.07%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.369 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $70.2402 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 10 consecutive days.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (May 30, US Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 70.2402 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of 70.2402 million US dollars. Currently, the total net inflow of ETHA has reached 4.606 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 9.445 billion US dollars, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.04%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.046 billion US dollars.

data.title: Revolving Games Completes New Round of Funding Led by Pantera Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 video game publisher Revolving Games announced the completion of a new round of financing led by Pantera Capital to expand its game distribution ecosystem based on RCADE Network. The specific amount was not disclosed. The company plans to accelerate the release of the "War of Nova", "Hatchlings" series and the new work "Skyborne: Phoenix Flight", which will be launched in a PC-only beta in the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow in the U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $70.2 million into the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF yesterday. This substantial investment highlights growing interest in Ethereum-based financial products among investors.

data.title: Security Breach Highlights Risks of Mnemonic Phrase Exposure
data.description:
According to Foresight News, SlowMist founder Yu Jian has reported a security breach involving the exposure of mnemonic phrases. A user had four mnemonic phrases leaked, leading to the theft of funds from four corresponding wallet addresses. The hacker converted the stolen assets into ETH and laundered them through FixedFloat.

Yu Jian emphasized the risks associated with prolonged online exposure and widespread distribution of mnemonic phrases or private keys. He warned that the longer these are used online and shared among multiple users, the higher the likelihood of leakage, making it increasingly difficult to trace the source of the breach.
